purpose: Route ambiguous marketing requests to the narrowest child skill across performance analytics, competitive analysis, and content production.
selection_order: Measurement and diagnosis beat comparison or content production when the request is fundamentally about KPI definition, reporting, attribution, or explaining what changed.
Competitive analysis beats content production when the request needs source-backed positioning, battlecards, or content-gap evidence before drafting assets.
Default to content creation only when the main deliverable is the actual marketing artifact rather than the analysis behind it.

children.name: marketing-performance-analytics
children.summary: Turns marketing data into KPI choices, recurring reports, funnel diagnostics, attribution guidance, and optimization priorities.
route_when: The request is about marketing KPIs, reporting cadence, attribution, forecasting, dashboards, or explaining why performance changed.
The main output is a measurement framework, performance diagnosis, or recommendation tied to business outcomes.
avoid_when: The user mainly needs competitor or positioning analysis rather than metrics work.
The primary deliverable is copy or content structure rather than performance insight.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this child before routing when the runtime does not already include the analytics leaf under the marketing router.

children.name: marketing-competitive-analysis
children.summary: Builds source-backed competitor, messaging, positioning, and battlecard analysis for marketing strategy and enablement.
route_when: The request is about competitors, positioning, messaging comparisons, market maps, battlecards, or content-gap reviews.
The main output is a comparison, positioning implication, or strategic recommendation based on external evidence.
avoid_when: The user mainly needs KPI reporting, attribution, or performance diagnosis.
The primary deliverable is finished copy rather than competitive insight.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this child before routing when the runtime does not already include the competitive-analysis leaf under the marketing router.

children.name: content-creation
children.summary: Drafts or structures marketing content artifacts across blog, social, email, landing page, press release, and case-study formats.
route_when: The request explicitly asks for copy, an outline, a content brief, a subject line, a CTA, or a formatted marketing asset.
The main deliverable is the actual content artifact rather than the analysis that might inform it.
avoid_when: The user still needs performance diagnosis before deciding what content to create.
The user still needs competitor or positioning analysis before content production would be honest.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this child before routing when the runtime does not already include the content-creation leaf under the marketing router.
